title: pelargonium reclinatum
intro: Pelargonium reclinatum, also known as the Cape geranium or stink geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Pelargonium reclinatum include its ability to help alleviate cold and flu symptoms, as well as reduce stress and anxiety. Pelargonium reclinatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
